---
title: "first_package"
author: "Egor Smirnov"
format: html
---

# Shared Properties

## Libraries

```{r libraries}
library(devtools)
```

## Checks

```{r check}
has_devel()
```

```{r version}
packageVersion("usethis")
```

```{r git}
git_sitrep()
```

```{r vaccinate_true}
#it sets vaccinated to true,
#git_vaccinate()
```

```{r configure_main}
#it sets default initial branch to main
#git_default_branch_configure()
```

```{r token_create}
#it automatically moves you to the page to create a token
#create_github_token()
```

```{r token_set}
#it allows you to paste your new token
#gitcreds::gitcreds_set()
```

## Create Package

```{r}
create_package("~/Desktop/animalsounds")
```
